scope: LAION CLAP promoted-package exact-fixture runtime authority

failure.message: The inner worker returned a runtime-failure evidence object with embedding_gate null. The outer cleanup finalizer assumed a dictionary, raised AttributeError, and failed to publish the immutable receipt.

correction.strategy: Treat a null or non-object embedding gate as a failed gate while preserving the inner worker error and cleanup telemetry in the published receipt.

next_action: Commit and push the fail-closed finalizer correction, then run one corrected canary from the new immutable control revision to expose and retain the original inner runtime result.
